programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: One of the most famous frontmen in the world, David Lee Roth is unlike most lead singers.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Famous for hits like "I'm Eighteen," Alice Cooper shocked and scandalized his way to stardom.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: As part of Aerosmith, Steve Tyler was one of the most iconic, bombastic, charismatic frontmen.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Gene Simmons and Paul Stanley somehow shared the limelight and made a spectacle like no other.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: With hits like "Livin' On A Prayer," Bon Jovi is equally successful as a solo artist and actor.

programme.title: Get to the Heart: The Barbara Mandrell Story
programme.desc: This compelling portrait of country music star Barbara Mandrell looks at her early career, the car accident in 1984 that almost killed her and her ultimate recovery.

programme.title: High Lonesome - The Story Of Bluegrass Music
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: High Lonesome traces the music and sounds from its Appalachian roots to the present. The rise; fall; and consistent revival of bluegrass chronicled through oral history and visual record.

programme.title: Bob Ross: The Happy Painter
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the beloved painter's journey from humble beginnings to pop-culture icon, how one local TV ad evolved into a phenomenon.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Dry mountains, spiny shrubs and cacti, take a drive deep into the desert with Bob Ross and enjoy this fantastic oval surprise!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Real or imaginary? It doesn't matter which as Bob Ross captures a great mountain and forest scene on specially cut plywood!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into an oval classic with Bob Ross and get inspired by the gorgeous browns and oranges of undoubtedly the most beautiful season of all.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Cross a frozen stream under the shelter of a grand covered bridge and enjoy the tranquility of a beautiful Bob Ross winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An interesting way to frame two pictures! Bob Ross paints a mountain landscape from luscious summer to beautiful winter, both on one canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs a unique technique, using both black and white basecoats, to create a happy little stream tumbling down a rocky meadow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Winter scenes don't have to be cold! With a touch of the sun's warmth, Bob Ross turns the chill of winter into a golden day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a brisk quiet day, follow Bob Ross along a trail covered in fresh white snow, surrounded by warm colors and fuzzy bark trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The warmth of the morning sun illuminates this inviting Bob Ross styled woodland scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft misty background, sweet snow-kissed cabin, and rich trees and bushes - all nestled down inside a winter oval painting by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the evening light, Bob Ross creates a fast-flowing little waterfall happily running through the lush green meadow grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a beautiful summer getaway with rugged brown peaks, clear blue waters, and a cozy little cabin too.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Under the most glorious of skies, enjoy the rhythmic flow of deep sea waters crashing and splashing upon the surrounding rocks and cliffs - Bob Ross style!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you far into the untouched forest to discover an old country home on a cliff, completely hidden by surrounding foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Go on a real nature hike with Bob Ross - follow the overgrown path deep in the woods and enjoy the silent beauty of the surrounding stillness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the sounds of quiet waters, velvety green shrubs, and distant foothills. Bob Ross creates a perfect scene of relaxation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a warm winter morning, the surroundings still undisturbed by Nature's little creatures; enjoy the freshness of a new day not yet awake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Ferne Sirois shares her own American Indian heritage in this adorable portrait of a playful, smiling little child.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: This beautiful lake in the glen will leave you fully rested and at peace with the world; Bob Ross creates a quiet mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you on a journey through the majestic forest where you can smell the sweet aroma of pines and taste cool mist in the air.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow the old dirt road to that quaint country barn nestled in nature's greenery - Bob Ross paints your destination today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins recalls memories of summers past in this scene originally painted on July 4, 1995.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The colorful Milky Way is the backdrop for striking silhouettes of happy little Bob Ross trees in this night scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Gently rolling mountains make an amazing backdrop for this Bob Ross masterpiece; a winding stream and textured ground vegetation provide the rest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel down an abandoned road with Bob Ross and stumble upon an old weathered barn that has seen better days - what dreams are made of.

programme.title: Hearty Ham Hock

programme.title: Indian Street Food With Jamie
programme.desc: A bite-sized clip selection of Jamie's most-loved recipes and kitchen moments.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a French twist; shows new ways to use up stale bread; and cooks up his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his friend and mentor Gennaro Contaldo.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie reinvents a roast chicken by combining it with the flavors of a Margherita pizza-basil, tomato and mozzarella -to create a glorious new family favorite, then whips up his Prawn toast toasties, the perfect snack for sharing.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up his restaurant-quality avocado hollandaise, and then he gets his son Buddy involved in cooking a different pizza for all the family to enjoy.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie demonstrates an easy tray bake, chicken and pepper jalfrezi, where the oven does all the hard work; pierogi dumplings stuffed with broccoli and cheese.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks his incredible Avocado pastry quiche, with a delicious cheesy and basil filling, and shows us how to take a classic steak to the next level.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up a superfast, extra delicious crispy breaded chicken for the family; he and Buddy share their secrets to a cheat's dessert; then Jamie shows us how to transform a burger by using sweet potato in two new ways.

programme.title: Save With Jamie
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver prepares pot-roasted ham hocks with parsley sauce, while roasting butternut squash to add to spinach rotolo.

programme.title: Twin Peaks

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall follow the trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: As Hunter and McCall investigate a string of jewelry store robberies, they pursue the thieves in an alley and McCall shoots a man who may be innocent.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to catch an ATM robber with a bounty hunter who's better known for bringing in his capture more dead than alive.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When fellow workers at a labor camp nickname Richard Kimble Doc it prompts three criminals, who have kidnapped a boy, to draft him into service when the boy is hurt.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble is forced to defy hurricane warnings to transport a couple from the mainland to the Florida Keys.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble happens to be in the background when a sidewalk photographer snaps some newlyweds and it leads to concentrated trouble.

programme.title: The Lady In Red
programme.desc: A farm girl (Pamela Sue Martin) turns to guns, sin and bathtub gin with gangster John Dillinger (Robert Conrad).

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Feuding with Sheriff Lyle Wallace (Ernest Borgnine), Martin Penwald (Kris Kristofferson) unites scores of his fellow-drivers via Citizen Band radio into a mile-long convoy which, powered by pent-up resentments, rolls along the Arizona highways.

programme.title: Gator
programme.desc: The Feds want Gator McKlusky (Burt Reynolds) to go undercover to expose a local crime boss and former boyhood pal, Bama McCall. When Gator discovers Bama is involved in extortion, prostitution, and murder, the suspense builds to an explosive climax!

programme.title: Gone In 60 Seconds

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz

programme.title: A Place in the Field
programme.desc: A battle-shocked veteran goes on a road trip to fulfill a promise to a fallen comrade.

programme.desc: After a familiar girl goes missing, two detectives race against time before a serial killer claims her as his next victim.

programme.title: Lamb
programme.desc: In rural Iceland, a childless couple discovers a strange and unnatural newborn in their sheep barn. They raise her as their own, but sinister forces are determined to return the creature to the wilderness that birthed her.

programme.desc: As an actress begins to adopt the persona of her character in a film, her world becomes nightmarish and surreal.

programme.title: Pet Sematary Two

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers
programme.desc: After making a horrific discovery in the basement of a old church, Trish and her brother Darry watch their routine road trip home turn into a heart stopping race for their lives. They are now the chosen prey of a force that relentlessly pursues them.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.desc: The story takes place in modern day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen year old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.desc: A cursed gunman (Wesley Snipes) whose victims come back from the dead recruits a young warrior to help in the fight against a gang of zombies.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.
